label: Live Scores
description: Compact horizontal ticker of live and suspended fixtures with scores and match clock.

0.6.note: No async loading path — data is synchronous filtered from context.

0.7.note: Empty state: 'No live matches' renders when liveRows.length===0.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary present in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=["sports-trading"]. 0.3 availableOn=["sports"]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 No direct mock imports. 0.6 No async loading path — data is synchronous filtered from context. 0.7 Empty state: 'No live matches' renders when liveRows.length===0. 0.8 No error path in context. 0.9 No dead code.

1.1.note: Data via useSportsData().filteredFixtures — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: Org filter affects bets; fixture ticker is scope-agnostic (public event data).

1.6.note: Empty scope shows all live fixtures.

1.7.note: No reference data in widget file. Note: wsStatus indicator shows WebSocket connection health — correctly sourced from context.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useSportsData().filteredFixtures — no inline fetch. 1.2 Context reads useGlobalScope(). 1.3 Org filter affects bets; fixture ticker is scope-agnostic (public event data). 1.4 N/A — control-bar widget, no client scope. 1.5 N/A — strategy filter not applicable. 1.6 Empty scope shows all live fixtures. 1.7 No reference data in widget file. Note: wsStatus indicator shows WebSocket connection health — correctly sourced from context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts).
